summary: Backend-only testing completed successfully for Occupational Data Platform. All 15 API endpoints tested and passed. Deterministic automation scoring engine working correctly with no LLM hallucination. EU AI Act compliance properly enforced.
passed_tests: Database status and table counts (12 occupations, 17 tasks, 68 automation scores)
High automation tasks endpoint - returns tasks with >80% automation score
EU compliance blocked tasks - properly flags High-Risk and blocked tasks
Deterministic scoring engine - formula S_task = (D * w_d + C * w_c) * P * 100 works correctly
Cross-regional code mapping - O*NET/NOC 2026/ESCO crosswalk functioning
Data sources attribution - proper licensing and version info available
Occupation search - finds relevant occupations by query
Root API endpoint with version and endpoints documentation
success_percentage: backend: 100% (15/15 tests passed), frontend: N/A (backend-only testing requested)
